case_title: YEE, CHUN YAN vs. PRISKE, LINDA et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PRISKE, LINDA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRISKE, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1109 JUDAH ST. #3, S.F, CA. 94122 $4,869.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,869.90, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO A COST BILL.
